name: Scroll-driven CTA highlighter
structure: passive scroll observer toggles active class on CTAs
visual: A passive scroll observer that glows whichever CTA is nearest viewport-center.
placement: Page-wide behaviour layered onto CTA buttons.
states: Toggles an 'active/bloom' class as the user scrolls.
animation: Passive observer toggles a bloom/active class as the nearest CTA enters viewport-centre (~300ms).
